_note: Event template for the VIA ticketing channel. Provision with: node scripts/provision-event.mjs events/sbw-2026.json. Live SBW store is already provisioned via register_store; this file is the repeat-deploy template / source of truth.
name: Singapore Blockchain Week 2026
headline: Buy your Singapore Blockchain Week pass in USDC. For agents and humans.
description: The official VIA channel for Singapore Blockchain Week 2026 passes (13 to 17 November 2026, Singapore and the Johor-Singapore Special Economic Zone). Pay in USDC on Base and receive your pass. Open to autonomous AI buying agents and to people.

redemption.instructions: Redeem your code on the Singapore Blockchain Week Luma page. Enter it at checkout to claim your pass.

fulfilment._note: Flip mode to 'luma_api' once SBW's Luma Plus key (set in env SBW_LUMA_API_KEY) and the event_api_id are available (expected next week). Until then code_pool applies, and luma_api auto-falls-back to code_pool if the key/event is missing.

concierge_facts.title: Dates and venue
concierge_facts.body: Singapore Blockchain Week 2026 runs 13 to 17 November 2026. Venue: the Republic of Singapore and the Johor-Singapore Special Economic Zone, Malaysia.

concierge_facts.title: Refunds
concierge_facts.body: Refund policy is being confirmed with Singapore Blockchain Week. Contact the organiser for current terms.

tiers.title: SBW Visitor Pass
tiers.includes: Visitor access to Singapore Blockchain Week 2026, 13 to 17 November 2026 in Singapore and Johor. Early-bird pricing until 3 August 2026.

tiers.includes: General conference access to Singapore Blockchain Week 2026, 13 to 17 November 2026 in Singapore and Johor. Early-bird pricing until 3 August 2026.
